stories.title: US Open Round 2 Underway — Clark Leads by 4 at Shinnecock, Scheffler and McIlroy Chasing
stories.angle: Friday at Shinnecock Hills: Wyndham Clark carries a 4-shot lead into Round 2 after going -6 through 16 holes of Round 1 (suspended Thursday due to darkness). Clark finished his R1 Friday morning before beginning R2. Scheffler shot +2 (72) — 8 behind Clark. McIlroy carded -1, 5 shots back. The cut line is shaping up at around even par.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Wyndham Clark enters Round 2 of the US Open with a FOUR-SHOT lead.

He was -6 through 16 holes when play stopped Thursday night. Friday morning: finish 2 holes, then immediately into Round 2.

Largest US Open first-round lead since 1933. #USOpen

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The Round 2 US Open leaderboard at Shinnecock Hills:

🥇 Clark -6 (leader by 4)
🔍 Scheffler +2 — 8 back
🍀 McIlroy -1 — 5 back

It's Clark's championship to lose right now. But Scheffler's Grand Slam is still breathing. #USOpen

**Key Facts:**
- [HIGH] Wyndham Clark leads at -6 through 16 holes of Round 1 (suspended darkness Thursday) — multiple sources
- [HIGH] Clark has a 4-shot lead over the field — CBS Sports, NBC Sports
- [HIGH] Clark will finish his final 2 holes of Round 1 Friday morning before beginning Round 2
- [HIGH] Sam Stevens, Ryder Cowan (a), Max McGreevy, Matt Fitzpatrick, Dustin Johnson, Gary Woodland all tied T-2 at -2 — multiple sources
- [HIGH] Scheffler shot +2 (72): 4 birdies, 4 bogeys, 1 double bogey — NBC Sports
- [HIGH] McIlroy at -1, T-9, five back from Clark — multiple sources
- [MEDIUM] Round 1 was a long day due to suspension; Round 2 tee times started later Friday
- [HIGH] If Clark holds 4-shot lead after Round 1, it would be largest US Open R1 lead since Tony Armour's 5-shot lead in 1933

stories.title: Scheffler's Grand Slam Chase — Eight Back at the Halfway Mark
stories.angle: Scottie Scheffler shot +2 (72) in Round 1, surviving a difficult day with 4 birdies and 4 bogeys (plus a double). He's 8 shots behind Clark entering Round 2 — a significant gap, but Scheffler has the form and Shinnecock favors players who can grind it out over the weekend. Final round June 21 = his 30th birthday and Father's Day. Grand Slam: Masters x2, PGA, The Open — US Open would complete it.

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Scottie Scheffler is 8 shots back at the US Open.

But consider: final round is Sunday June 21 — his 30th birthday AND Father's Day.

He needs the US Open for a calendar Grand Slam (Masters x2, PGA, The Open done).

Write him off at your own risk. ⛳ #USOpen #GrandSlam

article.headline: Scheffler Is 8 Back — But the Grand Slam, His 30th Birthday, and Father's Day Keep the Dream Alive

stories.title: LIV Golf — New Board, New Strategy, Same Question: Can It Survive?
stories.angle: After Saudi PIF confirmed ending funding after 2026, LIV announced Thursday a new independent board: Gene Davis (chair) and Jon Zinman. Ducera Partners is handling fundraising, seeking $250-350M. Louisiana event postponed (heat/calendar). The league will complete 2026 on Saudi funding but is racing the clock for new investors. The new New Orleans postponement is a red flag for the remainder of the schedule.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
LIV Golf has a new independent board:
— Gene Davis (chair)
— Jon Zinman

Saudi PIF ends funding after 2026. Ducera Partners is raising $250-350M in replacement investment.

The Louisiana event was just postponed. The questions are just beginning. ⛳ #LIVGolf

- [HIGH] Louisiana event postponed — "peak summer heat and crowded global sports calendar" — LIV statement
- [HIGH] PIF will fund remainder of 2026 season — league can complete events as planned
- [HIGH] Ducera Partners hired to find new investors; seeking $250-350M
- [MEDIUM] Previous estimate: only $200M of $600M committed for 2026 delivered — prior research

stories.title: McIlroy at -1 After Round 1 — The 2011 US Open Champion Returns to the Stage
stories.angle: Rory McIlroy sits at -1, T-9, after Round 1 — five back from Clark, right in contention. McIlroy won his only US Open in 2011 by a record 16 under at Congressional. He won the 2026 Masters. A second major this year and his first US Open since 2011 would be one of the great golf stories of 2026.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Rory McIlroy is T-9 at the US Open — 5 shots behind Clark.

He won this tournament in 2011 by 16 shots. He won the 2026 Masters earlier this year.

A back-to-back major year is very much on the table. Don't forget about Rory. 🍀 #USOpen #RoryMcIlroy

article.headline: McIlroy Is Five Back and Right in It: The Case for Rory at Shinnecock

stories.title: Meijer LPGA Classic Round 2 — Yan Liu Led Day 1, Second Round Underway
stories.angle: Yan Liu led the Meijer LPGA Classic after Round 1 with a 6-under 66 on a cold first day at Blythefield Country Club in Belmont, Michigan. Round 2 is underway Friday. The $3M event runs June 18-21, with Father's Day Sunday admission free for dads. KPMG Women's PGA Championship follows June 25-28 at Hazeltine.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Yan Liu opened the Meijer LPGA Classic with a 6-under 66 at Blythefield CC in Michigan.

"Jam-packed" leaderboard behind her as Round 2 gets underway.

Father's Day admission is FREE for dads on Sunday. KPMG Women's PGA follows next week at Hazeltine. ⛳ #LPGA
